transactions.desc: The Giants designated Borucki for assignment Sunday.
The Giants recalled Beck from Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday.
The Royals optioned Cerantola to Triple-A Omaha on Sunday.
The Royals reinstated Strahm (knee) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
The Tigers optioned Workman to Triple-A Toledo on Sunday.
The Pirates recalled Sanders from Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday.
The Twins selected Paredes' contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
The Twins recalled Adams from Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
The Twins optioned Klein to Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
The Brewers optioned Rodriguez to Triple-A Nashville on Sunday.
The Brewers reinstated Zastrzyny (shoulder/ribs) from the 60-day injured list Sunday.
The Giants selected Cox's contract from Double-A Richmond on Sunday.
The Marlins recalled White from Triple-A Jacksonville on Sunday.
The Pirates reinstated O'Hearn (quadriceps) from the 10-day injured list Sunday, Colin Beazley of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.
The Tigers reinstated Carpenter (shoulder) from the 10-day injured list Sunday. He'll start at designated hitter and bat cleanup in the Tigers' series finale versus the White Sox.
The White Sox recalled Murphy from Triple-A Charlotte on Sunday.
The Rays designated Wantz for assignment Sunday.
The Rays recalled Martin from Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
The Rays recalled Booser from Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
The Giants recalled Brennan from Triple-A Sacramento on Saturday.
The Rockies reinstated Feltner (elbow) from the injured list ahead of his start Saturday against the Giants.
The Athletics recalled Kelly from Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Phillies reinstated Pop (calf) from the injured list Saturday and designated him for assignment.
The Phillies reinstated Lazar (oblique) from the 60-day injured list Saturday and optioned him to Triple-A Lehigh Valley.
The Reds designated Nicolas for assignment Saturday.
The Reds selected Richardson's contract from Triple-A Louisville on Saturday.
The Marlins recalled Kempner from Triple-A Jacksonville on Saturday.
Heasley cleared waivers and was outrighted to Triple-A Durham on Saturday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
Kelenic cleared waivers and opted to become a free agent Saturday, Scott Merkin of MLB.com reports.
Toronto designated Voth for assignment Saturday, Mitch Bannon of The Athletic reports.
